source_file: Crop Recommendation using Soil Properties and Weather Prediction.csv
source_note: N is percent; P and K are ppm. Weather features are seasonal, so canonical temperature/rainfall are left blank and original columns are preserved.
Rainfall max is below 300 in this source; kept as raw low-scale rainfall and not converted to yearly millimeters.
Rainfall max is below 300 and unit was not provided in the prompt; kept unconverted.
